text:
**BLUF:** The migration cost is estimated at $180K-$240K over 6 months, with a 65% probability of timeline overrun.

## What the Data Says
- Current monolith deployment: 45 minutes
- Team size: 6 engineers
- Estimated microservices: 8-12 services

## Scenario Analysis
| Scenario | Cost | Timeline | Risk |
|----------|------|----------|------|
| Optimistic | $180K | 4 months | Low |
| Most Likely | $210K | 6 months | Medium |
| Pessimistic | $240K | 9 months | High |
